courseTitle: Advanced AI, Simulation, and Procedural Systems
title: GOAP or Planner Game
genericDescription: Model goals, actions, and world state; create agents that plan; debug plan selection.
specificDescription: Build a game with at least one agent that chooses action sequences using GOAP, planning, or an equivalent planner. Include visible plan state for instructors.
gradingRubric: 30 pts planner correctness; 20 pts meaningful agent behavior; 20 pts world-state modeling; 15 pts debug visibility; 15 pts notes.
